clauses.title: Supply chain risk management strategy
clauses.text: Board-approved documented cyber supply chain risk management strategy covering identification, assessment and treatment of third-party/vendor risks.

clauses.title: Third-party risk assessment by criticality
clauses.text: Due diligence and cyber risk assessment of each third party before onboarding and periodically, proportionate to criticality.

clauses.title: Vendors meet equal-or-higher standards
clauses.text: Third parties handling RE systems/data must meet cybersecurity standards equal to or higher than the RE's CSCRF obligations.

clauses.title: Contractual cybersecurity clauses
clauses.text: Contracts embed right-to-audit, breach notification, data protection, confidentiality, CSCRF compliance, and secure exit (data return/destruction).

clauses.title: Right to audit third parties
clauses.text: RE retains and exercises the right to audit/inspect third-party security posture and incident handling.

clauses.title: Vendor breach notification
clauses.text: Vendors must promptly notify the RE of incidents affecting RE systems/data so the RE can meet SEBI/CERT-In timelines.

clauses.title: Audit of material subcontractors (4th party)
clauses.text: Material subcontractors must be identified, held to equivalent requirements, and within the RE's audit scope.

clauses.title: RE solely accountable
clauses.text: Outsourcing does not dilute the RE's responsibility; the RE remains solely accountable for third-party cybersecurity/compliance.

clauses.title: Software Bill of Materials (SBOM)
clauses.text: Obtain/maintain SBOM for all software in core/critical ops; vendors supply SBOM at purchase and on change, with the minimum prescribed fields and a board-approved exception process.

clauses.title: Encryption in transit & at rest
clauses.text: Encrypt data in transit (strong TLS) and at rest (AES-256-class) per data classification.

clauses.title: Keys & key management within India
clauses.text: Encryption keys and all key-management operations for RE data must remain within India.

clauses.title: MFA, least privilege & PAM
clauses.text: Least-privilege/need-to-know with PAM; MFA mandatory for critical systems and admin/privileged accounts (zero-trust aligned).

clauses.title: Patch/remediation timelines
clauses.text: High/critical patches within one week; other VAPT findings within three months.

clauses.title: 24x7 SOC & continuous monitoring
clauses.text: 24x7 SOC with SIEM/centralised logging and SOC efficacy reporting; M-SOC option for smaller REs.

clauses.title: Recovery planning, RTO/RPO, spare hardware
clauses.text: Tested BCP/DR with RTO/RPO; MIIs and Qualified REs maintain spare hardware for rapid recovery.

clauses.title: VAPT & cyber audit by CERT-In empanelled
clauses.text: VAPT and cyber audits at a cadence set by RE category, by CERT-In empanelled auditors, reported via CSCRF annexures.

clauses.title: ISO 27001 for MIIs & critical facilities
clauses.text: MIIs and critical third-party facilities (PDC/DR/NDR, SOC, data centre/colocation) must hold ISO/IEC 27001.

clauses.title: Cloud CSP requirements & localisation
clauses.text: Cloud via MeitY-empanelled + STQC-certified CSPs; market-critical/regulatory data stored/processed within India.

clauses.title: Incident reporting to SEBI & CERT-In
clauses.text: Report incidents to SEBI and CERT-In within mandated timelines (incl. CERT-In 6-hour rule) with RCA and remediation.
